intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0117_time_1755.00s-1770.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: He's just a playful little sea urchin is all.
I swear, Smee, this is propelling me to delirium.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0118_time_1770.00s-1785.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: Oh, you big brute, you! Off with you.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0119_time_1785.00s-1800.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: Go on, now. Shoo, shoo. And take your arms with you.
You ought to be ashamed of yourself.
At least the crocodile had manners.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0120_time_1800.00s-1815.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: Mr Smee, pipe up the crew.
We're going ashore to find Peter Pan!

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0121_time_1815.00s-1830.00s.mp4
analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0122_time_1830.00s-1845.00s.mp4
analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0123_time_1845.00s-1860.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: How come you want to go home so bad?
I have to get back to my family.
Well, I don't want to talk about it.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0124_time_1860.00s-1875.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: If you must know, we had a fight.
I told my little brother you weren't real.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0125_time_1875.00s-1890.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: But I have to get back and set things right.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0126_time_1890.00s-1905.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: you can't get home that way.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0127_time_1905.00s-1920.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: It was nice meeting you, Peter Pan.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0128_time_1920.00s-1935.00s.mp4
analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0129_time_1935.00s-1950.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: I just want to go home.
Well, you know, the only way out of here is to fly.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0130_time_1950.00s-1965.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: Come on, I'll show you how.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0131_time_1965.00s-1980.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: Set your sights for Peter Pan!
Haven't we searched the island a thousand times before?

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0132_time_1980.00s-1995.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: I beg your pardon, Mr Smee?
I said that searching for Pan is...

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0133_time_1995.00s-2010.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: There'll be no rest until we have that boy in irons.
I really don't think this will...

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0134_time_2010.00s-2025.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: This is ridiculous. I can't fly!
Well, of course you can't, but I can!
I guess I'm just smarter than you.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0135_time_2025.00s-2040.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: Well, then it must be my good looks.
Or maybe you're full of hot air.
Hey! Look, anybody can do it.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0136_time_2040.00s-2055.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: Yeah! All it takes is faith...
Okay, Tink, let her have it.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0137_time_2055.00s-2070.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: Gosh, Tink, if she can't fly home,
I guess she'll have to move in with us.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0138_time_2070.00s-2085.00s.mp4
analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0139_time_2085.00s-2100.00s.mp4
analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0140_time_2100.00s-2115.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: -I got her! -I got her! I got her!

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0141_time_2115.00s-2130.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: I thought you said you got her.
How will I ever get back home?
yet she wants to go home.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0142_time_2130.00s-2145.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: Smee, do you know what this means?
We'll get me treasure and the boy.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0143_time_2145.00s-2160.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: Things to do, places to be. Important things!
-No wonder you can't fly. -Give it back, Peter.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0144_time_2160.00s-2175.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: Come on! Why don't you guys ever throw to me?
No, stop it! This isn't funny!

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0145_time_2175.00s-2190.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: This is just a game to you, isn't it?

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0146_time_2190.00s-2205.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: Gosh, Jane, we didn't mean to make you mad.
You're just a bunch of silly, ridiculous children.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0147_time_2205.00s-2220.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: I don't believe in any of this!
And I especially don't believe in fairies!

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0148_time_2220.00s-2235.00s.mp4
analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0149_time_2235.00s-2250.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: I think there's something wrong with Tinker Bell.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0150_time_2250.00s-2265.00s.mp4
analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0151_time_2265.00s-2280.00s.mp4
analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0152_time_2280.00s-2295.00s.mp4
analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0153_time_2295.00s-2310.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: I need you here to take care of your mom and Danny.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0154_time_2310.00s-2325.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: Can you do that for me?

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0155_time_2325.00s-2340.00s.mp4
analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0156_time_2340.00s-2355.00s.mp4
analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0157_time_2355.00s-2370.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: Hey, put a cork in it!

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0158_time_2370.00s-2385.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: If we don't get Jane to believe in fairies,
Well, let's just go and make her believe!
You can't just make somebody believe in fairies.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0159_time_2385.00s-2400.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: -But we believe. -Yeah, it ain't hard for us.
That's it! We gotta make Jane one of us!
You want to help Tink, don't ya?

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0160_time_2400.00s-2415.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: Don't worry, Tink. We'll save you.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0161_time_2415.00s-2430.00s.mp4
analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0162_time_2430.00s-2445.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: Run me through. You'll be doing me a favour.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0163_time_2445.00s-2460.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: All I've ever wanted was to get away from this dreadful place
and home to my dear, sweet mother.
But blast it all! Peter stole my treasure

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0164_time_2460.00s-2475.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: and my men would mutiny if I so much as tried to leave without it.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0165_time_2475.00s-2490.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: you wish to return home as well.
I guess we're in the same boat.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0166_time_2490.00s-2505.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: I'll give you passage home on my ship
and you can help me recover my treasure.
Don't you see? The treasure's useless to Peter.
He's not sensible like you and I.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0167_time_2505.00s-2520.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: He's just a boy who'll never grow up.
And, really, what other choice do you have?
It's not as though you could fly home.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0168_time_2520.00s-2535.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: And if it's really no use to Peter...
Wait! You must swear not to harm Peter.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0169_time_2535.00s-2550.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: Me? Actually harm Peter Pan? Perish the thought!
It's all a game, you see.
I shan't harm him. You have my word.
"I, Captain James Hook, do hereby swear
"not to harm a single hair on Peter Pan's head."

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0170_time_2550.00s-2565.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: Leave the light on, Mommy. Your baby boy's coming home.
Now, when you've located the treasure
just give this a wee toot.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0171_time_2565.00s-2580.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: You're doing the right thing, my dear.

sous_titres.text: We want you to feel like...

sous_titres.text: And thank you, milady. I couldn't have done it without you.

sous_titres.text: A good captain always goes down with his ship.

sous_titres.text: I don't want to be a good captain!

sous_titres.text: You can fly now. You can go home.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0240_time_3600.00s-3615.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: And I'll miss you. All of you.
But there's someone back home who needs me.

sous_titres.text: And besides, now I've got great stories to tell him
and they'll all be about Peter Pan and the Lost Boys.
Mademoiselle, it would be my pleasure to escort you back to London.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0242_time_3630.00s-3645.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: The pleasure will be all mine, good sir.
Well, it's a long way home.
Give me your best shot, Tink.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0243_time_3645.00s-3660.00s.mp4
analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0244_time_3660.00s-3675.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: You were right. He is most remarkable.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0248_time_3720.00s-3735.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: If only I'd listened to you.
Did you, now? Was it Hook again?
Were those pirates up to their old tricks again?

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0249_time_3735.00s-3750.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: I know how to take care of that old codfish.
-We can do it together, Danny. -We can?
I saw him, you know. Captain Hook kidnapped me.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0250_time_3750.00s-3765.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: Stuffed me into an old dirty bag, he did.
He took me off to Never Land and tried to feed me to a giant octopus.
And Tinker Bell was so beautiful.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Peter Pan 2. Return to Never Land.2002.BDRemux 1080p\interval_0251_time_3765.00s-3780.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: But her light almost went out. You have to be very careful.

I'll always believe in you, Peter Pan.
